detail.description:
Pokémon Trading Card Game Pocket has players in 150 countries and regions around the world.
Use your mobile devices to enjoy collecting and battling with Pokémon cards anytime, anywhere!

■ Open packs every day to collect cards!
Players can enjoy the experience of collecting, with two booster packs available to open every day at no cost. Collect different kinds of Pokémon cards, like those with nostalgic illustrations from the past, as well as completely new cards exclusive to this game!
detail.recentChanges:
● New Pulsing Aura booster packs are now available.
● Gold frames have been added to flair.
● A Claim All feature has been added for packs.
● Updates to the Obtain Items feature.
● A 2D pattern code feature has been added for friend requests.
● Revisions have been made to some features.
